_comment: Configuration-driven remedy content for the Prediction Engine (V2.0 Phase 7), keyed by Vimshottari Dasha lord. Kept as its own file rather than extending backend/rules/remedies.json so that file's existing, already-tested shape/behavior (services/rules/remedyRuleEvaluator.js) is left completely untouched. `lordRemedyInfo` repeats the same gemstone/mantra/day/deity fields remedies.json already has for the 7 classical planets (values kept identical/consistent) and adds Rahu/Ketu, which the Vimshottari sequence includes as Mahadasha lords but which remedies.json's Lagna-lord remedies never need (no sign is ruled by a shadow planet).
dashaLordRemedyTemplate: As the current Dasha lord is {lord}, wearing a {gemstone} (after professional consultation) and chanting "{mantra}" on {day}s is traditionally suggested to help strengthen its beneficial effects during this period.
categoryRemedyTemplate: For {category} matters specifically, offerings or prayers to {deity} are traditionally suggested alongside the general Dasha-lord remedy above.
